data.author: Jane Msaba
data.content: Exxonim made our company registration seamless. From name search to COI, everything was handled professionally and within the promised timeline.

data.author: David Kimario
data.content: We needed TIN and tax registration urgently. Exxonim team guided us through every step and we were fully compliant within a week.

data.author: Sarah Lissu
data.content: NGO registration felt overwhelming until we found Exxonim. They handled constitution drafting, ministry registration, and donor compliance setup.

data.author: James Mngoma
data.content: Annual returns and regulatory renewals used to stress us out. Now Exxonim handles everything on time. Worth every shilling.

data.author: Amina Hassan
data.content: Work permit processing for our expat staff was smooth and fast. Exxonim liaison with Ministry of Labour saved us weeks of back-and-forth.
